name: Peanut Butter Pudding Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix together 2/3 cup peanuts, flour, and softened butter. Press into the bottom of an 8 x 12 inch baking dish. Bake for 20 minutes at 350°F. Cool thoroughly.
2. Cream peanut butter and cream cheese. Add sugar and mix well. Fold in 4.5 oz. frozen whipped topping. Spread over cooled layer 1.
3. Mix puddings with milk until thickened. Spread over layer 2.
4. Top with 9 oz. frozen whipped topping. Sprinkle with chocolate and 1/3 cup peanuts. Chill for 2 to 3 hours. Makes 12 servings.
